forecast-period.text: Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula at night. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
Extreme
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

High chance of showers in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny day. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then tending south to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog on the eastern slopes. Slight chance of a shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.
Mostly sunny day. Medium chance of showers in the evening. Winds northerly 30 to 45 km/h turning west to northwesterly 20 to 25 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
High
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Medium chance of showers in the early morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the north in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to southwesterly before dawn then tending southeast to southwesterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny day. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon then tending southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Becoming cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h turning northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
High
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the early morning. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sunny. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northerly 25 to 40 km/h in the middle of the day then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 30s.
High
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

High chance of showers in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h early in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then tending south to southwesterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northerly 25 to 35 km/h in the middle of the day then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
High
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

High chance of showers in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the early morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sunny. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 30s.
High
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the west, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and early afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day then becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Sunny. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northerly 25 to 35 km/h in the middle of the day then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 30s.
High
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and early afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and early afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon then tending southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the south. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sunny. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early morning then tending southeast to southwesterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog in the west. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.
Sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly 25 to 35 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly before dawn then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.

Mostly sunny. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day then becoming southeast to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 30.

Mostly sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to southeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 30.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with damaging winds and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 35 to 50 km/h tending north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h in the early afternoon then shifting south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
High
Sun protection 10:30am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower east of Ceduna in the early morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the early morning. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Medium chance of showers west of Nullarbor, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 30 to 45 km/h in the morning then turning west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 30s.
High
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Medium chance of showers in the early morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog in the south. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the south. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Becoming cloudy. Very high chance of showers in the late afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h turning west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:30am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Slight chance of a shower in the early morning. Mostly sunny day. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly in the late afternoon then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then tending southerly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower near the east coast in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers west of Coober Pedy, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Coober Pedy. Thunderstorms possibly severe with damaging winds and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding in the far west in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Daytime maximum temperatures 31 to 36.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Coober Pedy in the early morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 32.

Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending south to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 33.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the far west, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to southeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 34.
Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Leigh Creek. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northeast to southeasterly in the early morning then tending southeast to southwesterly in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 28 to 35.
Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching 28 to 36.
Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 36.
